'''danate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zackly|zackly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zackly|zackly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| danate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:danate|danate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:danatesher|danatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:danatesherĂ«m|danatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:danatero|danatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:danateshĂ«|danateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:danateshĂ«m|danateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidanatero|gokidanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidanateshĂ«|gokidanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidanateshĂ«m|gokidanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godanankerom|godanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godanankeshĂ«|godanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godanankeshĂ«m|godanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godanankeya|godanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:danaterom|danaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:danatemu|danatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:danateya|danateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidanaterom|gokidanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidanatemu|gokidanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidanateya|gokidanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dananate|dananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dananatesher|dananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dananatesherĂ«m|dananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dananatero|dananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dananateshĂ«|dananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dananateshĂ«m|dananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidananatero|gokidananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidananateshĂ«|gokidananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidananateshĂ«m|gokidananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godananankerom|godananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godananankeshĂ«|godananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godananankeshĂ«m|godananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godananankeya|godananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dananaterom|dananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dananatemu|dananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dananateya|dananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidananaterom|gokidananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidananatemu|gokidananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidananateya|gokidananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠnĂŠte|dĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠnĂŠtesher|dĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠnĂŠtero|dĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠnĂŠtero|gokidĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠnĂŠnkerom|godĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠnĂŠnkeya|godĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠnĂŠterom|dĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠnĂŠtemu|dĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠnĂŠteya|dĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠnĂŠterom|gokidĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠnĂŠteya|gokidĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafnafte|dafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafnaftesher|dafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafnaftesherĂ«m|dafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafnaftero|dafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafnafteshĂ«|dafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafnafteshĂ«m|dafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafnaftero|gokidafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafnafteshĂ«|gokidafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafnafteshĂ«m|gokidafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafnafnkerom|godafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafnafnkeshĂ«|godafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafnafnkeshĂ«m|godafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafnafnkeya|godafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafnafterom|dafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafnaftemu|dafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafnafteya|dafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafnafterom|gokidafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafnaftemu|gokidafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafnafteya|gokidafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
